vulnerabilities.title: windows-selenium-chromedriver downloads Resources over HTTP
vulnerabilities.description:
Affected versions of `windows-selenium-chromedriver` insecurely download an executable over an unencrypted HTTP connection. 

In scenarios where an attacker has a privileged network position, it is possible to intercept the response and replace the executable with a malicious one, resulting in code execution on the system running `windows-selenium-chromedriver`.


## Recommendation

No patch is currently available for this vulnerability.

The best mitigation is currently to avoid using this pack
